calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2002 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 611 for settlement conference. Present: Judge Wick; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Plaintiff represented by counsel David G. Mendez, Esq., and defendant represented by Francisco Silva, Esq., and Representative Robert Ernest Borton. Case settled on the record. Trial date of October 15,2002 is vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-28-2002 Continued To Oct-15-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Not Of Mot To Continu Or Vacate Trial Date And Sett. Hear. Date; Mp&As
Off Calendar Aug-28-2002 Granted Per Written Order

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned for Settlement Conference in Dept.611. Present: Judge Diane Wick; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Brenda Fields. Case settled on the record. Trial date of September 3,2002 is vacated.
